mapper.select: select (select count(*) from farming_cycle where is_public = 1) as publicCycleCount, (select count(*) from product_info where status = 'ON_SALE') as productCount, (select count(*) from sys_user where role_type in ('PLANTER','BREEDER') and status = 'ENABLED') as farmerCount, (select count(*) from order_info) as orderCount
select * from banner_info where status = 'ENABLED' order by sort_no asc, id desc
select * from notice_info where publish_status = 'PUBLISHED' order by create_time desc limit 5

select p.*, u.real_name as seller_name, u.avatar as seller_avatar, c.category_name from product_info p left join sys_user u on p.seller_id = u.id left join product_category c on p.category_id = c.id where p.status = 'ON_SALE' order by p.sales_count desc, p.id desc limit 8

select p.*, u.real_name as seller_name, u.avatar as seller_avatar, c.category_name from product_info p left join sys_user u on p.seller_id = u.id left join product_category c on p.category_id = c.id where p.status = 'ON_SALE'
and ( p.product_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or c.category_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by case when p.seller_type in ('PLANT', 'PLANTER') then 1 else 2 end asc, p.seller_id asc, p.sales_count desc, p.id desc

select fc.*, u.real_name as owner_name from farming_cycle fc left join sys_user u on fc.user_id = u.id where fc.is_public = 1 and fc.business_type = #{businessType} order by fc.start_date desc limit 6

select p.*, u.real_name as seller_name, u.avatar as seller_avatar, c.category_name from product_info p left join sys_user u on p.seller_id = u.id left join product_category c on p.category_id = c.id where p.id = #{id}
select fc.*, u.real_name as owner_name from farming_cycle fc left join sys_user u on fc.user_id = u.id where fc.id = #{id}

select pc.*, oi.product_name, su.real_name as user_name, su.avatar as user_avatar from product_comment pc left join order_item oi on pc.order_item_id = oi.id left join sys_user su on pc.user_id = su.id where pc.product_id = #{productId} and pc.status = 'VISIBLE' order by pc.comment_time desc, pc.id desc
select fr.*, st.template_name from farming_record fr left join stage_template st on fr.template_id = st.id where fr.cycle_id = #{cycleId} order by fr.record_time desc, fr.id desc
